title: Comprehensive Management
description: Effortlessly manage multiple clinic locations, diverse doctor schedules, and paperless patient records from one unified dashboard.

title: Smart Scheduling
description: Enable 24/7 online booking with a smart slot engine that automatically factors in doctor availability, breaks, and holidays.

title: Digital Health Records
description: Go paperless with structured clinical encounters, digital prescriptions, and a secure, searchable medical history for every patient.

title: Telemedicine Ready
description: Conduct virtual consultations with built-in Zoom and Google Meet support, featuring automatic meeting link generation and calendar sync.
